summary: Comprehensive backend + key frontend testing for ReferME. Backend: 33/33 pytest tests passed covering health, auth (signup/OTP/login/forgot/reset/me), profile completion, wallet first-deposit-bonus, interview slot→book→complete with credit grants, jobs apply with free-use, referral→hire flow with +500 credits, leaderboards, payouts with admin approval, admin stats/users with RBAC, disputes, notifications, and auth guards. Frontend: app loads, /welcome redirect works, admin login lands on admin dashboard with live stats (24 students/7 pros/3 employers/5 jobs), student signup→OTP→/student/dashboard works (wallet balance, free uses, leaderboard widget, tabs all rendered, mock OTP visible in UI). All API integrations verified end-to-end. Mocked APIs working as documented: SendGrid returns mock_otp in response, Razorpay accepts any signature.

minor.issue: Dead code branch in create_deposit_order: 'if is_first and amount > FIRST_DEPOSIT_MIN_INR' contains a redundant `body.amount_inr == FIRST_DEPOSIT_MIN_INR` check that is structurally unreachable. Logic still works correctly but should be cleaned up.
Minimum payout enforced as Pydantic ge=500 returning 422 rather than a friendlier 400 with a 'min ₹500' message. Acceptable but mobile UI should map 422 to a readable error.

ui_bugs.issue: The single OTP TextInput on /otp visually renders only the last typed character (e.g., '6' instead of '657470') even though the value is fully captured and verify succeeds. Cosmetic but confusing to users. Reference: /app/frontend/app/otp.tsx

Tab items lack explicit testID (tab-home/tab-jobs/tab-wallet/tab-ranks/tab-profile). Text=Jobs/Wallet/Interviews etc. failed automation 'element not visible' because labels are non-interactive Text overlaid on TouchableOpacity. Add testID to each tab container to support automated testing.

No default role selected; user must click a role card else submit silently shows an Alert. Consider preselecting 'student' or showing inline validation rather than an Alert popup for better mobile UX.

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated → use boxShadow; 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated → use style.pointerEvents. Non-blocking but should be migrated.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecated 'shadow*' style props in use — migrate to 'boxShadow'. Reference: console warning shown on every screen render.
Deprecated 'props.pointerEvents' — migrate to 'style.pointerEvents'. Reference: console warning on /signup.

action_items: Migrate deprecated RN-web style props: shadow* → boxShadow, props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents.
Add testID to bottom tab bar items (tab-home, tab-jobs, tab-wallet, tab-ranks, tab-profile, etc.) for reliable automation.
Fix OTP single-input visual: ensure entered characters render as masked/visible string rather than just the last character. Reference: /app/frontend/app/otp.tsx.
Consider preselecting a default role in signup or replace Alert with inline error.
Clean dead branch in /api/wallet/deposit/create-order (create_deposit_order) — redundant equality check.
Map backend 422 (Pydantic) to user-friendly toast/inline errors on mobile (payouts, etc.).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~46K chars / single file — split into routers (auth, wallet, jobs, interviews, payouts, admin) for maintainability (currently violates <700-line guideline).
Mock-payment confirm path skips signature verification when keys are unset — ensure production deployment requires RAZORPAY_KEY_ID/SECRET set, else log a startup warning.
Admin auto-seed on startup is idempotent — good. test_credentials.md is present with admin & demo-employer credentials.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (welcome/login/signup/OTP/dashboards verified; tab nav blocked by RN-web automation, not a real bug)

seed_data_creation: Tests create disposable users with prefix 'qa_'/'test_' under @referme.io and @gmail.com domains. Backend admin & demo-employer are auto-seeded by server.py on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_referme_api.py is the regression source — run with `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v`. Frontend automation note: React Native Web OTP TextInput is invisible to Playwright element handles; use page.mouse.click(195, 268) for OTP box and page.keyboard.type for input. Bottom tab labels are not directly clickable via text= selectors — needs testID or coordinate click. EmailStr rejects reserved TLDs (.test/.example) so use @gmail.com / @referme.io.
rca_of_issue: No blocking bugs. Minor cosmetic: OTP screen displays only last character of typed code due to RN Web TextInput styling — value is captured correctly (verify succeeds and navigates). Likely the input style uses a single very large font cell that collapses display to last char; recommend converting to a 6-cell OTP input or fixing display rendering.
